name: WYNDHAM HOTELS & RESORTS, INC.
summary: . Wyndham Hotels& Resorts, Inc. (Wyndham Hotels, the Company, we, our or us) is the worlds largest hotel franchising company by number of franchised properties, with over 8,300 affiliated hotels and approximately 869,000 rooms located in approximately 100 countries and welcoming approximately 138 million guests annually worldwide. We operate a hotel portfolio of 25 brands. Our 25 brands are primarily located in secondary and tertiary cities and approximately 80% of the U.S. population lives with...
